context: Verify that the agent handles a benchmark harness failure gracefully: quotes the error verbatim, sets outcome to failed, still produces a valid repro file with correct frontmatter, and does not fabricate verified results.

checklist.name: benchmarks/sources/deusdata-codebase-memory-mcp-repro.md is created with valid YAML frontmatter
checklist.description: The file is created at the correct path and opens with a YAML frontmatter block containing all required fields.

checklist.name: outcome is set to failed
checklist.description: The frontmatter outcome field is exactly 'failed', not 'unverified' or 'partially-verified'.

checklist.name: Error message is quoted verbatim in Reproduction attempt section
checklist.description: The Cannot find module 'better-sqlite3' error is reproduced verbatim in the repro file — not paraphrased.

checklist.name: No verified figures are fabricated
checklist.description: The agent does not invent or copy verified figures from the README when the harness did not run. The Reproduction attempt section clearly states no metrics were obtained.

checklist.name: Reported figures section present with (as reported) markers
checklist.description: Self-reported figures from the README are still recorded, clearly marked (as reported), separate from the failed run.

checklist.name: How to reproduce section documents the fix needed
checklist.description: The section notes that npm install or equivalent is required before the harness can run.

checklist.name: Validation script passes
checklist.description: Running scripts/validate-repro-benchmark.sh on the produced file exits 0.

checklist.name: No unfilled placeholders
checklist.description: The produced file contains no angle-bracket placeholders.

checklist.name: stderr is not suppressed
checklist.description: The agent does not use 2>/dev/null or equivalent when running the harness. The error output is captured and quoted.

checklist.name: ANALYSIS Stage 2.2 updated with failure pointer
checklist.description: analysis/ANALYSIS-deusdata-codebase-memory-mcp.md Stage 2.2 references the repro file and notes outcome: failed.
